name: player touches from plays — basic
description: Verifies the combined SQL aggregate for player_touches_from_plays (rush attempts + completed receptions) over nfl_plays. Spot-validated against 2024 REG-season top-10 RB/WR totals; delta vs (rush_attempts + receptions) = 0 for all rows.
expected_query: with "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL OR (trg_pid IS NOT NULL AND comp = true) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as touches_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."touches_from_plays" AS "touches_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB', 'WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."touches_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
